subject: Cannot access shared drive on finance floor
description: I cannot access the shared drive on the finance floor. Every time I try to map the network drive \\contoso-fs01\finance$, I get 'Access Denied'. I was able to access it yesterday. I have a quarterly report due by end of day and all the source data is on that drive. My manager, Lisa Park, confirmed she can still access it. I have tried restarting my computer, clearing cached credentials, and reconnecting. I also tried accessing it from a different computer in the same office and got the same error. I checked with three other colleagues on my team — two of them can access it, one cannot. The colleague who cannot access it (James Wu) started on the same day as me and is in the same AD group. subject: Screenshot of error attached
description:
Here is the error I'm seeing on my screen. Please see the screenshot below:

data:image/png;base64,

This happens every time I try to open SAP. Started this morning around 9 AM. I'm on my standard-issue Dell Latitude, docked, connected to Ethernet.

subject: Re: Re: Re: Fwd: Printer issue — 3rd floor
description:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: helpdesk@contoso.com
Date: Mon, Mar 16, 2026 at 4:30 PM
Subject: Re: Re: Re: Fwd: Printer issue — 3rd floor
To: facilities@contoso.com

Hi team,

Forwarding this again. The printer on the 3rd floor (HP LaserJet Pro near the break room) has been jamming constantly for the past week. Paper tray 2 seems to be the culprit. Facilities said it's an IT issue, IT said it's a facilities issue. Can someone please just fix it? We've been walking to the 5th floor to print for a week now.

Thanks,
Linda

---------- Original message ----------
From: linda.chen@contoso.com
Date: Thu, Mar 12, 2026 at 9:15 AM
Subject: Printer issue — 3rd floor
To: helpdesk@contoso.com

The printer near the break room on floor 3 keeps jamming. Started Monday. Paper tray 2 won't feed properly. HP LaserJet Pro model, asset tag IT-PRN-0342. Already tried clearing the jam and reloading paper. Happens every 2-3 pages.

---------- Forwarded by helpdesk ----------
From: helpdesk@contoso.com
Date: Thu, Mar 12, 2026 at 10:00 AM
Subject: Fwd: Printer issue — 3rd floor
To: facilities@contoso.com

Facilities — is this yours? The printer is company-owned IT hardware but the physical space is your domain.

---------- Reply from facilities ----------
From: facilities@contoso.com
Date: Fri, Mar 13, 2026 at 2:00 PM
To: helpdesk@contoso.com

This is definitely an IT issue. The printer hardware is managed by IT. We only handle the physical space and furniture.

subject: Outlook crashes when opening attachments
description:
Hi IT Support,

URGENT: My Outlook keeps crashing every time I try to open attachments.

Steps I’ve tried:

  1. Restarted Outlook in safe mode — same issue
  2. Cleared the Outlook cache folder
  3. Ran scanpst.exe on my .ost file — no errors found
  4. Uninstalled and reinstalled Microsoft 365 Apps

Error message: “Microsoft Outlook has stopped working. A problem caused the program to stop working correctly.”

This started after the KB5034765 update was pushed last night.

I'm on Windows 11 23H2, Office Version 2402 (Build 17328.20124).

Thanks,
Robert Kim
Compliance Department

PLEASE HELP 🆘🆘🆘

subject: AUTORESPONSE: Out of Office Re: [Ticket INC-1923] Follow-up needed

For urgent IT matters, please contact the Service Desk directly at x5000.
For project-related inquiries, please reach out to my delegate, Sarah Kim (sarah.kim@contoso.com).

I will respond to your email upon my return.

Michael Torres
